title: Kabanos and Egyptian Kebab Skewers
description: A unique and flavorful fusion of Egyptian and Eastern European cuisine, featuring tender kabanos sausage and juicy kebabs. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner or outdoor gathering.

ingredients.name: Egyptian kebabs
ingredients.notes: threaded with onions, bell peppers, and tomatoes

instructions: 2. Thread kabanos sausage pieces onto skewers with onions, bell peppers, and tomatoes.
3. Brush kebabs with oil and season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
4. Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until kabanos is cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast pita chips according to package instructions.
6. Warm chewy bread slices by wrapping in foil and heating on the grill for 2-3 minutes.
7. Serve kebabs with toasted pita chips and chewy bread, accompanied by lemon wedges.
